name: understand-figma
tagline: Fetches a Figma file via the Figma REST API and builds an interactive design knowledge-graph dashboard from a user-supplied personal access
verdict: Solid: FIGMA_TOKEN is read only from env, sent only to api.figma.com in a header, explicitly never written to graph/logs, and fetch is separated from non-deterministic LLM enrichment with idempotency (UP_TO_DATE short-circuit). Minor risks: Figma node names flow unsanitized into an LLM subagent (mild indirect-injection surface via a shared file's layer names

highlights.summary: Phase 2 passes raw Figma node data — including names/child names, which are attacker-controllable if the file is shared by an untrusted collaborator — directly into an LLM subagent (design-analyzer) w
No negative-trigger guidance (e.g., what to do for non-Figma inputs or already-current graphs beyond the UP_TO_DATE case) is stated anywhere in the file.
No version field or changelog/change-signal is present in the frontmatter or body of this SKILL.md.
